item.title:
NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 3min #FULL STEAM AHEAD — Ian Poulter addresses the recent talk about LIV Golf’s future
“We’ve h
item.description:
NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 3min #FULL STEAM AHEAD — Ian Poulter addresses the recent talk about LIV Golf’s future
“We’ve had heat for 5 years, 48 hours is not really that much of a distraction. We’ve got a great product and we’ve changed numerous things…”
(Via: @MajesticksGC ) De BENNY BOOMS ARMY 3 3 11 2 mil

item.title: PGATOURComms: PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 19min Matt Fitzpatrick cards a second-round 63 and currently leads by four strok
item.description:
PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 19min Matt Fitzpatrick cards a second-round 63 and currently leads by four strokes at the RBC Heritage.
It marks the second 63 of his career at Harbour Town Golf Links (2023/R3/Won) as Fitzpatrick seeks to become the 11th player to earn multiple titles at the RBC Heritage. 1 3 17 4 mil

item.title: PGATOURComms: PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 9min En respuesta a @PGATOURComms Fitzpatrick's 63 ties his career low on TOUR
item.description:
PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 9min En respuesta a @PGATOURComms Fitzpatrick's 63 ties his career low on TOUR in his 185th start (621 total rounds):
2026 RBC Heritage (R2) 2025 Genesis Scottish Open (R2) – T4 2025 Travelers Championship (R3) – T17 2024 Travelers Championship (R3) – T36 2023 RBC Heritage (R3) – Won 2 1 mil

item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 19min Perhaps no surer sign that PIF is done with LIV than O’Neil remaining in his role follow
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 19min Perhaps no surer sign that PIF is done with LIV than O’Neil remaining in his role following these shambolic attempts to pour water on the fire of the last 48 hours. 5 18 1 mil

item.title:
PGATOUR: PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 23min Hole-outs for everybody
Ben Griffin and Robert MacIntyre with back-to-back chip-ins for bird
item.description:
PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 23min Hole-outs for everybody
Ben Griffin and Robert MacIntyre with back-to-back chip-ins for birdie on No. 8 @RBC_Heritage .
Golf Channel 6 2 66 16 mil
